trustedSourceSummary: Fresh official consumer updates were combined with the latest archived comparison pages from 2025-2026. Organizations used: Altroconsumo. Altroconsumo's 2026 test lists Barilla and Pasta Reale as top pasta brands, based on laboratory testing and consumer ratings. The evidence is fresh, published in January 2026.
